column1: # Movie fixtures for the App Store demo server. Tab-separated. All
# entries are unambiguously public-domain in the US and present on
# TMDB so the enrichment pipeline runs end-to-end.
# Columns:
#   archive_id     archive.org item identifier (used in the fetch
#                  URL: https://archive.org/download/<id>/...).
#   tmdb_id        canonical TMDB id (passed to link-fixtures.sh
#                  to pin the catalog match).
#   title          display name — also drives the destination folder.
#   year           release year — also drives the destination folder.
#   target_file    filename inside <target>/movies/<Title (Year)>/.
#                  Always .mp4 (the fetch script normalizes to
#                  H.264 + AAC + faststart).
# Lines beginning with '#' or blank are ignored.
# Identifier verification cycle: archive.org items occasionally get
# darkened or re-uploaded under new ids. Run scripts/verify-
# fixtures.sh before each demo refresh; it probes every row and
# flags is_dark=true / 404 / no-MP4 entries so this list can be
# resnapped.
archive_id
The_General_Buster_Keaton
NosferatuLeVampire
ThePhantomoftheOpera
ATripToTheMoonGeorgeMelies
his_girl_friday
detour_202110
plan-9-from-outer-space_202009
night_of_the_living_dead_dvd

#     was a derivative work (Moroder cut, colorized, remastered)
#     with separate rights. The 1927 Lang original is PD in the
#     US but a clean upload doesn't appear in the top hits.
#   Charade (1963, tmdb 4808) — top hit `turner_video_341` is a
#     3-minute trailer, not the full feature.
